Interface IRasterTypeEnvironment2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control the raster type environment.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FBEFE2CD-7605-48B6-9663-E0588776E120")]
public interface IRasterTypeEnvironment2 : IRasterTypeEnvironment
